name: Mountaineer Birdies, LLC
address: 160 N Washington St, Berkeley Springs, WV 25411
about: Mountaineer Birdies, LLC is an indoor golf simulator facility founded in 2024 by Scott and Leslie Swink. Located in Berkeley Springs, WV, the venue operates by appointment and focuses on making golf accessible year-round. With a minimum rental time of one hour per bay, the facility caters to both individual practice and group play, offering club rentals for those without their own equipment. The establishment emphasizes a clean, safe environment with clear rules for player safety, equipment care, and respectful conduct.
why_golfers_like_it: Club rentals available for all skill levels
Family-friendly environment with adult supervision for juniors
Flexible booking with both appointments and walk-ins accepted
Emphasis on safety and a clean, well-maintained facility

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is permitted; patrons are asked to clean up their area before leaving. No on-site food services are provided.
No alcohol is permitted on-site and cannot be brought in by customers.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for men, women, and children for a small fee if you do not have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: You are able to bring food in with you. The venue provides soft drinks, water, and snacks. No alcohol can be brought in at any time.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes one person approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour to play 18 holes, depending on skill level and pace of play. The venue recommends 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mountaineer Birdies is kid-friendly. Children under the age of 16 must be supervised by an adult at all times.
